productDisplayName: John Players Men Printed Yellow T-shirt
description: Style note Sporty and stylish, this T-shirt from john players is high on energy. The bold graphic print against a colourful background adds zing to this tee, while the soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team it with jeans and sports shoes. Product Details Yellow T-shirt, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size L
